mapper.select:
SELECT
ROWNUM AS ROW_NUM
ROW_NUMBER() OVER( ORDER BY NOTC.REG_DATE DESC, NOTC.NOTICE_NUM DESC) AS ROW_NUM
, GETUSERNAME(NOTC.GATE_CD, NOTC.REG_USER_ID , #{ses.langCd}) AS REG_USER_NAME , CASE WHEN GETFILECOUNT(NOTC.GATE_CD, NOTC.ATT_FILE_NUM) = 0 THEN NULL ELSE GETFILECOUNT(NOTC.GATE_CD, NOTC.ATT_FILE_NUM) END AS ATTACH_FILE_NO_DISPLAY , (NOTC.REG_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS REG_DATE , (NOTC.START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') ' ~ ' (NOTC.END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS NOTICE_DATE , NOTC.VIEW_TYPE , NOTC.SUBJECT , NOTC.REG_USER_ID AS REG_USER_ID , NOTC.ATT_FILE_NUM AS ATTACH_FILE_NO , CASE WHEN NOTC.ATT_FILE_NUM IS NOT NULL AND ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCATCH WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND UUID = NOTC.ATT_FILE_NUM AND DEL_FLAG = '0') > 0 THEN '0' ELSE '1' END AS ATTACH_FILE_NO_DISPLAY_IMAGE , (NOTC.VIEW_CNT, 0) AS VIEW_CNT , NOTC.GATE_CD , NOTC.NOTICE_NUM , (NOTC.POPUP_FLAG, '0') AS ANN_FLAG FROM STOCNOTC NOTC WHERE NOTC.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND NOTC.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND NOTC.NOTICE_TYPE = 'PCN' AND NOTC.VIEW_TYPE IN ('USNA', 'USNC')
AND ((NOTC.START_DATE >= #{ADD_FROM_DATE} AND NOTC.START_DATE <= #{ADD_TO_DATE}) OR (NOTC.END_DATE >= #{ADD_FROM_DATE} AND NOTC.END_DATE <= #{ADD_TO_DATE}))
AND NOTC.START_DATE >= #{ADD_FROM_DATE}
AND NOTC.END_DATE <= #{ADD_TO_DATE}
AND UPPER(GETUSERNAME(NOTC.GATE_CD, NOTC.REG_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{ADD_USER_NAME}) '%'
AND UPPER(NOTC.SUBJECT) like '%' UPPER(#{SUBJECT}) '%'
ORDER BY NOTC.REG_DATE DESC, NOTC.NOTICE_NUM DESC

SELECT NOTC.SUBJECT , NOTC.NOTICE_NUM , NOTC.NOTICE_TEXT_NUM , NOTC.VIEW_TYPE , (NOTC.VIEW_CNT, 0) AS VIEW_CNT , (NOTC.START_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') as START_DATE , (NOTC.END_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') as END_DATE , (NOTC.REG_DATE, ' YYYY-MM-DD') REG_DATE , GETUSERNAME(NOTC.GATE_CD, NOTC.REG_USER_ID , #{ses.langCd}) AS REG_USER_NM , NOTC.REG_USER_ID REG_USER_ID , NOTC.ATT_FILE_NUM , (NOTC.POPUP_FLAG, '0') AS ANN_FLAG FROM STOCNOTC NOTC WHERE NOTC.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND NOTC.NOTICE_NUM = #{NOTICE_NUM}
